This Customizable 3D Printed Vinyl Storage Box Is the Last One You'll Ever Buy

April 6, 2025•5 min read

When You Take Your 7-Inch Collection Seriously

There's a certain point in every vinyl collector's journey when the improvised storage stops working. The shoeboxes stack up. The records tip over. You can't find anything without pulling out half the pile. You've spent serious money on the records themselves — why are you storing them like it's 1987?

This box was made for that moment.

The Premium 3D Printed 7-Inch Vinyl Storage Box

Handmade in New York, this storage box is built for serious collectors and DJs who want a storage solution that matches the quality of their collection. It's 3D printed from PETG and PLA filaments — materials chosen for their durability, light weight, and dimensional precision.

What Makes It Premium

Full customization. This isn't a box with a label slot — it's a box where your name, your label, your logo, or your DJ handle is printed directly into the design. Large custom font options mean your branding is immediately readable across the room.

Craftsmanship. Each box is printed to order in New York. There's no inventory, no shortcuts. The person making it is a vinyl enthusiast who understands exactly what this product needs to do.

Materials. PETG is the right material for this application. It handles the weight of a full box of records without warping, resists humidity better than PLA alone, and doesn't become brittle in cold environments the way cheaper plastics do.

Built for DJs and Serious Collectors

If you're a DJ who carries 7-inch records to gigs, you need storage that survives transport. Cardboard deteriorates. Plastic crates designed for 12-inch records are oversized and wasteful. This box is sized exactly for 7-inch singles — records stay upright, stay in order, and don't shift during transport.

If you're a collector, the customization options mean your storage can reflect your collection. A box with your label name on it stops being furniture and starts being part of the listening room aesthetic.

The Perfect Vinyl Gift

If you're shopping for a DJ or vinyl collector and want to give something genuinely useful rather than another scented candle or coffee mug — this is it.

It's practical, it's handmade, it's personalized, and it's from a maker who actually plays records. That combination is rare at any price point, and at $75 it's genuinely exceptional value for a made-to-order, customized piece.

Pair it with the 3D Printed 45 RPM Adapters for a complete, thoughtful vinyl gift set under $110.

Why Buy From This Maker

  • Ships from New York — shorter domestic shipping distances, faster delivery
  • Made to order — your box is not sitting in a warehouse, it's made when you buy it
  • Vinyl community — the maker understands the culture, which shows in every design detail
  • Fully customizable — name, logo, DJ handle, or label printed directly onto the box
  • PETG + PLA construction — built to last years, not months

Get Yours

At $75, this is a considered purchase — not an impulse buy. But for the collector who has been meaning to properly organize their 7-inch singles, or the DJ who wants storage that holds up on the road, the value is obvious the moment you see the product in person.

Order on Etsy: 3D Printed 7-Inch Vinyl Record Storage Box — Premium, Customizable
